title: Pet Import Guide: Singapore
description: Complete guide to importing your dog or cat to Singapore. Import requirements, quarantine, breed restrictions, and step-by-step process.
name: Singapore
overview: Importing a pet to Singapore is moderate. Here's what you need to know.

import_requirements.microchip: Required (ISO 11784/11785). Must be implanted before rabies vaccination
import_requirements.rabies_titre_test: Required for: Category B and C countries

sections.heading: Import requirements for Singapore
sections.body:
**Microchip:** Required (ISO 11784/11785). Must be implanted before rabies vaccination

**Rabies Vaccination:** Required

**Rabies Titre Test:** Required for: Category B and C countries

**Import Permit:** Not required

**Health Certificate:** Veterinary health certificate. Valid 10 days.

sections.heading: Breed restrictions in Singapore
sections.body: Governed by: Animals and Birds (Dog Licensing and Control) Rules

sections.heading: Routes to Singapore
sections.body:
We have detailed guides for the following routes:

- [Australia to Singapore](/routes/australia-to-singapore/)
- [United Kingdom to Singapore](/routes/united-kingdom-to-singapore/)

faqs.question: What vaccinations does my pet need to enter Singapore?
faqs.answer: At minimum, a rabies vaccination is required. Required Your pet must also be microchipped before vaccination.

faqs.question: Is there quarantine in Singapore?
faqs.answer: Check with Singapore's authorities for current quarantine policy.

faqs.question: Which airlines fly pets to Singapore?
faqs.answer: Multiple airlines serve pet cargo to Singapore. Check our route-specific guides for airline details on your particular origin-destination pair.
